title: orthosiphon thymiflorus var. viscosus
intro: Orthosiphon thymiflorus var. viscosus, also known as Bearberry or Orthosiphon, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and other kidney-related issues due to its diuretic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Orthosiphon thymiflorus var. viscosus include reducing inflammation, alleviating pain, and promoting the removal of toxins from the body, making it a popular herbal remedy for urinary issues. Herbal preparations of Orthosiphon thymiflorus var. viscosus include teas, capsules, and extracts, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
